title: Chaetogastra thulia
taxonomy: Chaetogastra thulia is a species of moth in the family Erebidae. It belongs to the subfamily Herminiinae, which is a group of small to medium-sized moths. The subfamily Herminiinae is further divided into various tribes, with Chaetogastra thulia being one of the species found within one of these tribes. The classification of Chaetogastra thulia reflects its evolutionary relationships and characteristics, which are used to group it with other similar species. By studying the classification of Chaetogastra thulia, researchers can gain a better understanding of the diversity and complexity of the moth family Erebidae.
